section_miscategorizations.text: A video of the twitch was provided by the patient.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Provision of a video is part of the history/context of the presentation rather than an examination or test result; the note does not describe any objective findings from the video itself.

section_miscategorizations.text: I will order shoulder radiographs to rule out other causes of the twitch.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This appears to be a content error rather than a sectioning error: shoulder radiographs are not a typical diagnostic test for a facial tic. However, by the given instructions, only section miscategorization should be evaluated, and as an order it is correctly placed in the Plan. This entry is included here solely to clarify that there is no section misplacement despite the clinical oddity.
